The actual answer misrepresents the key finding of the Chinchilla paper as the under-training issue, whereas the key finding is the compute-optimal recipe (approximately 20 tokens per model parameter) that the paper established. The Chinchilla paper (Hoffmann et al., 2022) specifically identifies the recipe for efficient training as its core contribution, not merely the observation that previous models were under-trained.
